summary: Plan ready for GitHub issue #1. The work is docs/examples only: tighten docs/specs/projection-schema.md into the v0 event-stream contract, add three JSONL example sequences, and document projection rebuild semantics while preserving product authority boundaries and non-goals.

Verify AC1-AC5 by doc inspection and JSONL example inspection.
warnings: Do not overwrite the pull-work artifact.

Acceptance remains pending until execution and verification produce evidence.
